subject: API Key Rotation Question
content: Hello, I need to rotate my API key for security compliance. Can you walk me through the process? I want to make sure there's no downtime during the rotation. Thanks!

subject: OAuth 2.0 Implementation Help
content: Hi TechCorp Team, I'm implementing OAuth 2.0 for our application and I'm stuck on the authorization code flow. After the user grants permission, I'm not receiving the authorization code at my redirect URI. The URI is registered correctly in the dashboard. Can you help troubleshoot? Our redirect URI is https://app.startup.io/auth/callback. Thanks!

subject: Webhook Retry Logic Question
content: Hello, we're experiencing issues with webhook deliveries. Our endpoint is returning 200 OK but TechCorp is retrying the delivery multiple times. How does the retry logic work? Do we need to acknowledge the webhook differently? This is affecting our production environment. Please advise urgently.

subject: Rate Limit Increase Request
content: Hi, our application is growing faster than expected and we're hitting our rate limits frequently. We're on the Pro plan (1000 requests/hour) but need at least 5000 requests/hour. Can we get a temporary increase while we upgrade to Enterprise? Our app is for a healthcare client and downtime is critical. Thanks!

subject: Data Export Format Question
content: Hello Support, I need to export all our user data for compliance reasons. What's the difference between CSV and JSON export formats? Also, how long are the export files retained? I need to download them next week but will be traveling. Can the download link be extended? Thanks for your help!

subject: Enterprise Plan Pricing
content: Hello, we're interested in the Enterprise plan for our organization of 500+ developers. Can you provide detailed pricing information including volume discounts? We also need information about SLA guarantees, dedicated support, and custom integrations. Please send a quote. Budget approval needed by end of month.

subject: Rate Limit Headers Not Showing
content: Hello, I'm making API calls but not seeing the rate limit headers (X-RateLimit-Limit, etc.) in the response. I'm using Python requests library. Are these headers only available on certain endpoints? Or do I need to enable them somewhere? This is important for implementing proper rate limit handling in our app. Thanks!

subject: Upgrade from Free to Pro

Also, will I be charged immediately or at the next billing cycle? I want to make sure the upgrade process is smooth for our users. Looking forward to your response!

subject: Enterprise Plan Features
content: Hello, we're evaluating TechCorp for enterprise use. Can you provide detailed information about Enterprise plan features? Specifically interested in: SLA guarantees, dedicated support channel, custom rate limits, SSO integration, audit logs, and compliance certifications (SOC2, HIPAA). Also need pricing for 100+ developers. Please connect us with sales team.

subject: API Documentation is Incomplete
content: Your API documentation is missing critical information. The OAuth 2.0 section doesn't explain how to handle token refresh properly. I've been stuck on this for 2 days! This is really frustrating and wasting our development time. Please update your docs with clear examples. Very disappointed with the developer experience so far.

subject: Security Audit - API Key Compromise
content: We suspect one of our API keys may have been compromised. What's the process for immediately revoking the key and investigating unauthorized access? We need to know: 1) How to revoke immediately, 2) How to audit recent API usage, 3) Best practices for key rotation. This is urgent. Please respond ASAP.

subject: First API Call - Getting Started
content: Hi! I just signed up and trying to make my first API call. I created an API key but getting 401 Unauthorized error. Here's my curl command: curl -H 'Authorization: my_api_key' https://api.techcorp.com/v1/users. What am I doing wrong? Is there a getting started guide or tutorial you can recommend? Thanks!

subject: Invoice Download
content: Hello, I need to download invoices for the past 6 months for our accounting records. Where can I find these in the dashboard? Also, can invoices be sent automatically to our accounting email each month? We use QuickBooks for accounting. Is there an integration available? Thank you!

subject: Team Member Access Management
content: Hi, we have 5 developers on our team and want to share API access. What's the best way to manage this? Should we create one shared API key or individual keys for each developer? We want to track usage per developer and be able to revoke access if someone leaves. What do you recommend? Thanks!

subject: Request for Refund
content: Hello, I was charged for the Pro plan but I meant to cancel during the trial. Can I get a refund? I haven't really used the service much. This was an honest mistake. Please let me know the refund process. Thank you.

subject: Comparison with CompetitorAPI
content: Hi, I'm currently using CompetitorAPI and considering switching to TechCorp. How do you compare in terms of pricing, features, and reliability? Specifically interested in rate limits, webhook reliability, and support quality. Why should I switch from CompetitorAPI? Thanks!

subject: Custom Integration Question
content: Hello, we're building a custom integration between TechCorp and our internal systems. Is there a way to batch multiple API calls into a single request? Also, do you support GraphQL or only REST? We're looking to optimize our API usage and reduce the number of round trips. Any guidance would be appreciated!

subject: API Response Time Issues
content: Hi, we're experiencing slow API response times (2-3 seconds) for simple requests. This is affecting our user experience. Is this normal? Our servers are in US-East region. Are there any performance optimizations you recommend? Should we be using a different region or CDN? This is becoming critical for our production app.

subject: GDPR Compliance Question
content: Hello, we're based in EU and need to ensure GDPR compliance. Does TechCorp store any EU customer data outside of EU? Do you offer data residency options? Can we request deletion of all customer data? We need this information for our compliance audit. Please provide detailed answers. Thank you!

Where can we find the deprecation schedule? We want to avoid breaking changes in our integration. Please provide details on your versioning policy. Thank you!

subject: Monitoring and Alerting Setup
content: Hi, we want to set up monitoring for TechCorp API usage and errors. Do you provide any monitoring endpoints or metrics APIs? Can we get webhook notifications for errors or rate limit warnings? Do you integrate with monitoring tools like Datadog, New Relic, or PagerDuty? We want proactive alerting for our production environment. Thanks!

subject: Thank You for Great Support!
content: Hi TechCorp Team, I just wanted to say thank you for the excellent support! My issue was resolved quickly and the support agent was very helpful. It's rare to find such good customer service these days. Keep up the great work! We're very happy with TechCorp and will definitely recommend you to other developers. Best regards!
